popularStory.description: Eleanor of England (Spanish: Leonor; c.1161 – 31 October 1214), was Queen of Castile and Toledo[3] as wife of Alfonso VIII of Castile. She was the sixth child and second daughter of Henry II, King of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León於1180年1月1日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯時，她的父親Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla24歲，母親Eleanor of England Queen of Castile19歲。她於1197年12月17日與Alfonso De León IX在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年11月8日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯享年66歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León于1180年1月1日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯时，她的父亲Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla24岁，母亲Eleanor of England Queen of Castile19岁。她于1197年12月17日与Alfonso De León IX在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年11月8日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯享年66岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León was born on 1 January 1180, in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, was 24 and her mother, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, was 19. She married Alfonso De León IX on 17 December 1197, in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 November 1246, in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 66, and was buried in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León est née le 1 janvier 1180, à Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Alfonso De León IX le 17 décembre 1197, à Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 novembre 1246, à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León am 1. Januar 1180 in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla 24 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of England Queen of Castile 19. Sie hat am 17. Dezember 1197 in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien Alfonso De León IX geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. November 1246 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León è nata il il 1 gennaio 1180 nel Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Alfonso De León IX il 17 dicembre 1197, nel Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1246, nel Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.Castilla y León, Spain: スペインカスティラ イ レoン
ja.Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain: スペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴス
ja.lifeSummary: Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de Leónが1180年1月1日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスブルゴスで生まれた時，父Rey Alfonso VIII de Castillaは24歳，母Eleanor of England Queen of Castileは19歳であった。1197年12月17日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドでAlfonso De León IXと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年11月8日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスで66歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스
ko.lifeSummary: Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León(이)가 1180년 1월 1일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of England Queen of Castile(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1197년 12월 17일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드에서 Alfonso De León IX(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 11월 8일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 버고스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1180, em Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Alfonso De León IX em 17 de dezembro de 1197, em Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1246, em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León родилась 1 января 1180 г. в местности бургос, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alfonso De León IX 17 декабря 1197 г. в местности валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 ноября 1246 г. в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León nació el 1 de enero de 1180, en Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alfonso De León IX el 17 de diciembre de 1197, en Valladolid, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1246, en Burgos, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Burgos, Castilla y León, España.
